title: viola × alpigena
intro: Viola × alpigena, also known as the hybrid pansy or alpine pansy, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Viola alpina and Viola lutea, resulting in a unique and beautiful flower. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Viola × alpigena include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce anxiety, while also providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in skincare products due to its anti-aging and moisturizing properties.
